title: helichrysum arctotidifolium
intro: Helichrysum arctotidifolium, a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, is native to the Mediterranean region and is also known as the false everlasting. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum arctotidifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum arctotidifolium is typically prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or tea, and can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
